mapper.select: select i.name, i.description, i.price, i.added_at, i.updated_at, i.quantity, i.category_id, i.wear_id, u.first_name, u.last_name from ebock.item i inner join ebock.user_ u on i.seller_cip = u.cip where not sold and not archived

select i.name, i.description, i.price, i.added_at, i.updated_at, i.quantity, i.category_id, i.wear_id, u.first_name, u.last_name from ebock.item i inner join ebock.user_ u on i.seller_cip = u.cip where i.seller_cip = #{cip} and not archived
